<?php /* * This file is part of the Predis package. * * (c) 2009-2020 Daniele Alessandri * (c) 2021-2025 Till Krüss * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Predis\Command\Redis\Search; use Predis\Command\Command as RedisCommand; /** * @see https://redis.io/commands/ft.sugget/ * * Get completion suggestions for a prefix. */ class FTSUGGET extends RedisCommand { public function getId() { return 'FT.SUGGET'; } public function setArguments(array $arguments) { [$key, $prefix] = $arguments; $commandArguments = (!empty($arguments[2])) ? $arguments[2]->toArray() : []; parent::setArguments(array_merge( [$key, $prefix], $commandArguments )); } }
